user.title: Add tracked device
user.description: Configure a device to track via ICMP ping.

data_description.host: The IP address of the device to ping.
data_description.device_name: A friendly name for this device.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to ping the device (in seconds).
data_description.consider_home: Time to wait after the last successful ping before marking the device as away (in seconds).

data_description.scan_interval: How often to ping the device (in seconds).
data_description.consider_home: Time to wait after the last successful ping before marking as away (in seconds).
data_description.ping_count: Number of ICMP packets to send per poll.
data_description.ping_timeout: Timeout for each ICMP packet (in seconds).
